hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: Start with the clearest edge paths before testing the center letters.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: Several short paths read cleanly from left to right.

hints.title: Almost there
hints.text: Use the upper rows to confirm the first two words, then solve downward.

explanation: This June 24 Wend entry is structured for the MVP update flow: reveal the obvious edge paths first, then use the remaining rows to confirm the answer set.
fastTip: Check the short horizontal paths first before testing the lower rows.
commonMistake: Do not reveal the full board too early if one short word is enough to keep your streak moving.
difficultyNote: Medium because the MVP placeholder grid is straightforward but still path-based.
